founder.name: Tom Beckett
founder.bio: Intensive care physician, 10 years NHS. First-time founder, non-technical.

company.name: HelioHealth
company.one_liner: Early sepsis warning model running on routine bedside vitals.

content.note: Regulatory check: the FDA 510(k) device database shows no submission on file for HelioHealth. Deck states 'FDA 510(k) clearance in progress'.

Pilot verification: one active pilot (letter of intent with a single NHS trust). The other two 'pilots' in the deck are exploratory conversations, not live deployments. Deck claims 'live in 3 hospital pilots'.
Retrospective validation study (AUROC 0.89, 14k admissions) appears genuine - shared the notebook and dataset description. Strong clinical signal.
